zh.lifeSummary: 當Elyzabeth Shelley於1516年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾代莫可時，她的父親John Shelley10歲，母親Lady Mary FitzWilliam9歲。她於1541年5月9日與John Hankyns在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾代莫可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1591年6月29日在她的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elyzabeth Shelley于1516年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾代莫可时，她的父亲John Shelley10岁，母亲Lady Mary FitzWilliam9岁。她于1541年5月9日与John Hankyns在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾代莫可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1591年6月29日在她的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Shelley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Shelley (Essex, Suffolk, Yorkshire) or from Shelley Plain in Crawley (Sussex). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Laois): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sealbhaigh ‘descendant of Sealbhach’, a byname from the adjective sealbhach ‘having possessions, wealthy’.

variants.name: Shallow
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny and Wexford): variant of   Shelley  .
English: nickname from Middle English shalou(e) ‘shallow’, conjectured also to mean ‘thin’; perhaps also the same word in the topographic sense of ‘shallow place in a stretch of water’.

variants.name: Shelly
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shelley  .

variants.name: Sheley
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Shelley  .

nameMeanings.name: Elyzabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Elyzabeth Shelley was born in 1516, in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, her father, John Shelley, was 10 and her mother, Lady Mary FitzWilliam, was 9. She married John Hankyns on 9 May 1541, in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 29 June 1591, in her hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elyzabeth Shelley est née en 1516, à Dymock, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Shelley, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary FitzWilliam, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé John Hankyns le 9 mai 1541, à Dymock, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 juin 1591, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elyzabeth Shelley 1516 in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Shelley 10 und ihre Mutter Lady Mary FitzWilliam 9. Sie hat am 9. Mai 1541 in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom John Hankyns geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Juni 1591 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elyzabeth Shelley è nata il nel 1516 nel Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, John Shelley, aveva 10 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary FitzWilliam, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato John Hankyns il 9 maggio 1541, nel Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 giugno 1591, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elyzabeth Shelleyが1516年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディモックで生まれた時，父John Shelleyは10歳，母Lady Mary FitzWilliamは9歳であった。1541年5月9日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディモックでJohn Hankynsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1591年6月29日に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elyzabeth Shelley(이)가 1516년 영국 그루스스터실르 디모c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Shelley(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary FitzWilliam(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 1541년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 디모c크에서 John Hankyns(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 6월 29일 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elyzabeth Shelley nasceu em 1516, em Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shelley, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary FitzWilliam, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hankyns em 9 de maio de 1541, em Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de junho de 1591, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elyzabeth Shelley родилась в 1516 г. в местности димокк, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Shelley было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary FitzWilliam, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hankyns 9 мая 1541 г. в местности димокк, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 июня 1591 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elyzabeth Shelley nació en 1516, en Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Shelley, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Lady Mary FitzWilliam, tenía 9 años. Se casó con John Hankyns el 9 de mayo de 1541, en Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de junio de 1591, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
